source_pr.title: plan: fix panic when explain
source_pr.body:
Sql like `explain select * from t order by t.v1 limit 0, 1;` will cause a panic because limit is a property of sort and doesn't has a child. If we call MarshalJSON of *Limit, we will get  a `index out of range` panic

PTAL @hanfei1991 @shenli @zimulala @coocood @XuHuaiyu @tiancaiamao

symptoms: "select * from t2 order by t2.c2 limit 0, 1", (executor/explain_test.go)
failure_signature: "select * from t2 order by t2.c2 limit 0, 1", (executor/explain_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: "select * from t2 order by t2.c2 limit 0, 1", (executor/explain_test.go)
